title: RepoBrief observability view
goal: Add a read-only Leitstand surface for RepoBrief/rLens bundle status, freshness, required artifacts, and export-safety warnings.

acceptance.assertion: The view lists available RepoBrief bundles with repo, snapshot time, status, and manifest path.
Export-safety failures or warnings are visible and never hidden behind a green status.
Links to reading packs or canonical dumps are local/operator pointers and not presented as public URLs unless export-safety permits.

validation.focused_view_and_controller_tests: 37 passed across 5 files on current Leitstand head
validation.live_service: leitstand.service active/running, NRestarts=0, exact release commit 4218e10ab4ea9dc029c98009f4f142c7bbcc81eb

metadata.outcome: Implemented through Leitstand PR #147 and retained on current production main under the canonical RepoGround name.

verified_acceptance.bundle-list: src/controllers/repoBrief.ts and src/views/repobriefs.ejs list repository, bundle stem, generated time, snapshot and preflight status, manifest and required artifacts.
verified_acceptance.export-safety-visible: Export-safety status, public-export readiness and warnings are rendered independently; missing input degrades to unknown rather than green.
verified_acceptance.local-only-links: Bundle directory, reading pack and canonical dump are rendered as local operator pointers, not public URLs, unless an upstream contract explicitly marks export readiness.
